Bengaluru · Karnataka
Swarabharatha
"Bringing Music to Life"

Born in the heart of Bengaluru, Swarabharatha is a multilingual live music ensemble founded and led by Bharath Mallad — a celebrated playback singer, India Book of Records holder, and Suvarnashri Ganakogile State Awardee.

From grand concert stages to intimate celebrations, Swarabharatha delivers performances that blend film, folk, devotional, and fusion music into unforgettable live experiences. Known for their signature stage mashups and the ability to connect with any audience in any language — this is a band that doesn't just perform. They make memories.

✨ Meet Bharath Mallad — Founder & Lead Vocalist →

Memories Created

🎸 Swarabharatha is celebrated for its unique mashups on stage — a signature style that lights up every performance with a one-of-a-kind banger. The energy is electric, the crowd always goes wild. No two shows are ever the same. 🔥

Devotional & Bhajan Performances

Across Karnataka — Belagavi to Mysore & Coastal Karnataka

Swarabharatha has united communities through the timeless power of bhajans and spiritual music, performing across the full length of Karnataka with devotion and soul.
